basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Office Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B Com + 2 years experience on accounts and office work
qualification.details: Office Assistant: B Com degree with 2 years of experience in accounts and office work.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Office Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Office Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Office Assistant post at IIT Guwahati is 06 June 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B Com degree along with at least 2 years of relevant experience in accounts and office work to be eligible for the Office Assistant role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Office Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 25,000.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Office Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Office Assistant position at IIT Guwahati will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Office Assistant position in this recruitment drive by IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Guwahati Office Assistant recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Office Assistant position at IIT Guwahati is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this IIT Guwahati Office Assistant recruitment is IITG/I&S/I/Project Staff Rectt-2026/116.
